ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 114-98) */,
  "favored" INTEGER /* Whether the Hornets were favored to win */,
  "played_as" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "hornets_moneyline" INTEGER /* Hornets' moneyline odds */,
  "opponent_moneyline" INTEGER /* Opponent's moneyline odds */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the game */,
  "halftime_score" TEXT /* The score at halftime */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "referee" TEXT /* The name of the referee(s) for the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type FOREIGN KEY ("game_type") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the opponent belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the opponent belongs to */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the opponent team was founded */,
  "record" TEXT /* The current record of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odds entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the odds belong to */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "hornets_moneyline" INTEGER /* Hornets' moneyline odds */,
  "opponent_moneyline" INTEGER /* Opponent's moneyline odds */,
  "betting_site" TEXT /* The name of the betting site providing the odds */,
  "bookie" TEXT /* The name of the bookie providing the odds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the odds were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the odds were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the result belongs to */,
  "favored_won" INTEGER /* Whether the favored team won */,
  "over_under" TEXT /* Whether the game went over or under the total points scored */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* The scores of each quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favored_teams" (
  "favored_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favored team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the favored team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the favored team */,
  "line" REAL /* The betting line for the favored team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the favored team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the favored team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favored_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favored_teams_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the game was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the video belongs to */,
  "video_file" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the video in seconds */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* The file path to the thumbnail image of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the video was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the video record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_videos_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
